details.msg_search_result: NOT_FOUND in any JS file. 'msg_' string does not exist in DuckDuckGo frontend code.

sse_architecture.sse_parser: eventsource-parser library embedded in vendor bundle (@1971)

sse_parser_logic.data_accumulation: r.data = r.data ? r.data + '\n' + a : a (newline-separated multi-line data)
sse_parser_logic.event_dispatch: Empty line triggers event dispatch and resets structure
sse_parser_logic.content_type_validation: Checks content-type starts with 'text/event-stream', throws error if mismatch

key_code_snippets.stream_reader: await C(n,await async function(e,t){const n=e.getReader();let r;for(;!(r=await n.read()).done;)...
key_code_snippets.content_type_check: function a(e){const t=e.headers.get('content-type');if(!(null!==t?void 0:t.startsWith(u)))throw new Error(`Expected content-type to be ${u}, Actual: ${t}`)}

implications_for_apf.msg_not_relevant: msg_ is NOT a frontend keyword — it's a backend SSE event type name sent by DuckDuckGo servers. Frontend parser doesn't filter by event name for data extraction.
implications_for_apf.required_format: Standard SSE: 'data: {warning_json}\n\n' — the data field is what gets accumulated and dispatched
implications_for_apf.content_type_required: Response MUST have content-type: text/event-stream or parser throws error
implications_for_apf.event_field_optional: event: field is optional. Parser reads it but app logic may not filter by it
implications_for_apf.multi_event_support: Parser supports multiple SSE events separated by blank lines

summary: DuckDuckGo JS 소스 캡처 완료. 3개 JS 파일 분석 결과: (1) msg_ 문자열은 프론트엔드에 존재하지 않음 — 백엔드 SSE 이벤트 타입명. (2) SSE 파서는 vendor 번들의 eventsource-parser 라이브러리. (3) 표준 SSE data/event/id/retry 필드 파싱. (4) content-type: text/event-stream 필수. (5) APF 경고 템플릿은 표준 SSE data: 필드 형식 사용 필요.
